message.content:
Read these files from `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbk/` and report the full content of each:

1. `rbgc_Constants.sh` — find all `RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_*` constants and any `RBGC_ARK_*` or hallmark-related constants
2. All step script files matching `rbgjb*.sh` in the Tools/rbk directory tree — these are the Cloud Build step scripts for conjure. Report each file's name and full content.
3. `rbgjb06*` specifically — this is the imagetools-create step that will be eliminated

Also search for any file named `rbgjb03-buildx-push-multi.sh` or similar.

For each file, report the full path, line count, and complete content.

content.text: I'll search for and read these files from the rbk directory. Let me start by exploring the structure and then reading the specific files you requested.
Now let me read the specific files you requested:

1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle GCP Constants - Implementation (no printf required)
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	# Multiple inclusion detection
24	# (Module state remains ZRBGC_* per BCG; external constants use RBGC_*)
25	test -z "${ZRBGC_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
26	ZRBGC_SOURCED=1
27	
28	######################################################################
29	# Internal Functions (zrbgc_*)
30	
31	zrbgc_kindle() {
32	  test -z "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc already kindled"
33	
34	  # Global Resource Naming (Google Cloud global namespace)
35	  # These resources compete in globally-unique namespaces across all of GCP
36	  # Pattern: {prefix}-{type}-{name}-{timestamp} where timestamp is YYMMDDHHMMSS
37	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX="rbwg"
38	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR="p"
39	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT="d"
40	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET="b"
41	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT="+%y%m%d%H%M%S"
42	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN=12
43	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX="[0-9]{${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN}}"
44	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_NAME_MAX=10
45	
46	  # Global resource validation patterns
47	  # Payor:  rbwg-p-YYMMDDHHMMSS
48	  # Depot:  rbwg-d-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS
49	  # Bucket: rbwg-b-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS
50	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PAYOR_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
51	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT}-[a-z0-9-]+-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
52	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_BUCKET_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET}-[a-z0-9-]+-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
53	
54	  # Basic Configuration
55	  readonly RBGC_ADMIN_ROLE="rbw-admin"
56	  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_ROLE="rbw-payor"
57	  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME="Recipe Bottle Payor"
58	
59	  # Service Account Prefixes
60	  readonly RBGC_MASON_PREFIX="mason"
61	
62	  # Timeouts
63	  readonly RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC=90
64	  readonly RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC=3
65	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX=7
66	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC=10
67	
68	  # URL Roots & Well-known Endpoints
69	  readonly RBGC_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL="https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token"
70	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM="https://iam.googleapis.com"
71	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM="https://cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
72	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com"
73	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
74	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD="https://cloudbuild.googleapis.com"
75	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING="https://cloudbilling.googleapis.com"
76	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE="https://storage.googleapis.com"
77	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER="https://secretmanager.googleapis.com"
78	  readonly RBGC_CONSOLE_URL="https://console.cloud.google.com/"
79	  readonly RBGC_SIGNUP_URL="https://cloud.google.com/free"
80	
81	  # OAuth Scopes
82	  readonly RBGC_SCOPE_CLOUD_PLATFORM="https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform"
83	
84	  # Service Usage Service Identifiers
85	  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_IAM="iam.googleapis.com"
86	  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_CRM="cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
87	  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
88	
89	  # Email/Domain Assembly
90	  readonly RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN="iam.gserviceaccount.com"
91	
92	  # API Version Paths
93	  readonly RBGC_IAM_V1="/v1"
94	  readonly RBGC_CRM_V1="/v1"
95	  readonly RBGC_CRM_V3="/v3"
96	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1="/v1"
97	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1BETA1="/v1beta1"
98	  readonly RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1="/v1"
99	  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1="/v1"
100	  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1="/v1"
101	  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1="/storage/v1"
102	  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_UPLOAD="/upload/storage/v1"
103	  readonly RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1="/v1"
104	
105	  # REST Path Fragments
106	  readonly RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS="/projects"
107	  readonly RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS="/locations"
108	  readonly RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES="/repositories"
109	  readonly RBGC_PATH_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS="/serviceAccounts"
110	  readonly RBGC_PATH_KEYS="/keys"
111	
112	  # REST Operation Suffixes
113	  readonly RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":getIamPolicy"
114	  readonly RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":setIamPolicy"
115	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX=":enable"
116	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_PATH_SERVICES="/services"
117	
118	  # Operation Prefixes
119	  readonly RBGC_OP_PREFIX_GLOBAL="operations/"
120	
121	  # Ark Artifact Suffixes
122	  readonly RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE="-image"
123	  readonly RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT="-about"
124	  readonly RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH="-vouch"
125	  readonly RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_DIAGS="-diags"
126	
127	  # Fact-file filenames (written to BURD_OUTPUT_DIR by producers, read by tests)
128	  readonly RBF_FACT_HALLMARK="rbf_fact_hallmark"
129	  readonly RBF_FACT_BUILD_ID="rbf_fact_build_id"
130	  readonly RBF_FACT_GAR_ROOT="rbf_fact_gar_root"
131	  readonly RBF_FACT_ARK_STEM="rbf_fact_ark_stem"
132	  readonly RBF_FACT_ARK_YIELD="rbf_fact_ark_yield"
133	
134	  # Artifact Registry (GAR) Composition
135	  readonly RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX="-docker.pkg.dev"
136	
137	
138	  # Canonical Role IDs
139	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_READER="roles/artifactregistry.reader"
140	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_WRITER="roles/artifactregistry.writer"
141	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_ADMIN="roles/artifactregistry.admin"
142	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_CONTAINERANALYSIS_OCCURRENCES_VIEWER="roles/containeranalysis.occurrences.viewer"
143	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_CLOUDBUILD_BUILDS_EDITOR="roles/cloudbuild.builds.editor"
144	
145	  # Common API Base Paths (project-independent)
146	  readonly RBGC_API_BASE_GCS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}"
147	
148	  # Cloud Resource Manager - Liens API
149	  readonly RBGC_API_CRM_LIST_LIENS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"
150	  readonly RBGC_API_CRM_DELETE_LIEN="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"
151	
152	  # Google Cloud Storage (GCS) APIs (project-independent)
153	  readonly RBGC_API_GCS_BUCKETS="${RBGC_API_BASE_GCS}/b"
154	
155	  readonly RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM="linux/amd64"
156	
157	
158	  # Worker pool infrastructure (dual pools: tether + airgap)
159	  readonly RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_TETHER="-tether"
160	  readonly RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_AIRGAP="-airgap"
161	  readonly RBGC_WORKER_POOL_SUFFIX="-pool"
162	  readonly RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS="/workerPools"
163	
164	  readonly ZRBGC_KINDLED=1
165	}
166	
167	zrbgc_sentinel() {
168	  test "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgc not kindled - call zrbgc_kindle first"
169	}
170	
171	# eof
172	
173

1	#!/bin/bash
2	# RBGJB Step 01: Derive hallmark from inscribe + build timestamps
3	# Builder: gcr.io/cloud-builders/gcloud
4	#
5	# Hallmark format: [cbg]YYMMDDHHMMSS-rYYMMDDHHMMSS
6	# - Mode prefix: c (conjure), b (bind), g (graft)
7	# - Inscribe timestamp (cYYMMDDHHMMSS) baked at inscribe time via _RBGY_INSCRIBE_TIMESTAMP
8	# - Realized timestamp (rYYMMDDHHMMSS) derived at build time (when image lands in GAR)
9	# Multiple builds of same inscribed JSON sort together by inscribe prefix
10	
11	set -euo pipefail
12	
13	echo "Build strategy: ${ZRBF_BUILD_STRATEGY}"
14	
15	HALLMARK="${_RBGY_INSCRIBE_TIMESTAMP}-r$(date -u +%y%m%d%H%M%S)"
16	test -n "${HALLMARK}" || { echo "HALLMARK empty" >&2; exit 1; }
17	echo "${HALLMARK}" > .hallmark
18	
19	# Expose hallmark via Cloud Build step output mechanism
20	# Results appear in results.buildStepOutputs[0] (base64-encoded, max 50 bytes)
21	echo -n "${HALLMARK}" > /builder/outputs/output
22

1	#!/bin/bash
2	# RBGJB Step 02: Register QEMU for cross-platform builds
3	# Builder: gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker
4	
5	set -euo pipefail
6	
7	# Register QEMU for cross-platform builds (arm64, arm/v7)
8	docker run --privileged --rm "${ZRBF_TOOL_BINFMT}" --install arm64,arm
9

1	#!/bin/bash
2	# RBGJBM Step 03: Build all platforms and push intermediate -multi tag to GAR
3	# Builder: gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker
4	# Substitutions: _RBGY_DOCKERFILE, _RBGY_MONIKER, _RBGY_PLATFORMS,
5	#                _RBGY_GAR_LOCATION, _RBGY_GAR_PROJECT, _RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY,
6	#                _RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX, _RBGY_INSCRIBE_TIMESTAMP,
7	#                _RBGY_GIT_COMMIT, _RBGY_GIT_BRANCH,
8	#                _RBGY_IMAGE_1, _RBGY_IMAGE_2, _RBGY_IMAGE_3 (optional base image refs)
9	#
10	# Uses buildx --push with docker-container driver. Cloud Build pre-populates
11	# Docker credentials in the host daemon; buildx inherits them via the
12	# docker-container driver's config propagation.
13	#
14	# The -multi tag is an intermediate artifact: per-platform pullback (step 04)
15	# extracts individual platform images from it.
16	
17	set -euo pipefail
18	
19	# Required inputs
20	test -n "${_RBGY_DOCKERFILE}"          || (echo "_RBGY_DOCKERFILE missing"          >&2; exit 1)
21	test -n "${_RBGY_MONIKER}"             || (echo "_RBGY_MONIKER missing"             >&2; exit 1)
22	test -n "${_RBGY_PLATFORMS}"           || (echo "_RBGY_PLATFORMS missing"           >&2; exit 1)
23	test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION}"        || (echo "_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION missing"        >&2; exit 1)
24	test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT}"         || (echo "_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT missing"         >&2; exit 1)
25	test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY}"      || (echo "_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY missing"      >&2; exit 1)
26	test -n "${_RBGY_INSCRIBE_TIMESTAMP}"  || (echo "_RBGY_INSCRIBE_TIMESTAMP missing"  >&2; exit 1)
27	test -n "${_RBGY_GIT_COMMIT}"          || (echo "_RBGY_GIT_COMMIT missing"          >&2; exit 1)
28	test -n "${_RBGY_GIT_BRANCH}"          || (echo "_RBGY_GIT_BRANCH missing"          >&2; exit 1)
29	
30	# Resolve base image build-args (anchored GAR refs or upstream pass-through)
31	BUILD_ARGS=""
32	test -z "${_RBGY_IMAGE_1}" || BUILD_ARGS="${BUILD_ARGS} --build-arg RBF_IMAGE_1=${_RBGY_IMAGE_1}"
33	test -z "${_RBGY_IMAGE_2}" || BUILD_ARGS="${BUILD_ARGS} --build-arg RBF_IMAGE_2=${_RBGY_IMAGE_2}"
34	test -z "${_RBGY_IMAGE_3}" || BUILD_ARGS="${BUILD_ARGS} --build-arg RBF_IMAGE_3=${_RBGY_IMAGE_3}"
35	
36	MULTI_URI="${_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION}${_RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT}/${_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${_RBGY_MONIKER}:${_RBGY_INSCRIBE_TIMESTAMP}-multi"
37	
38	docker buildx version
39	docker version
40	
41	# Capture Docker daemon state before build (forwarded to about via -diags)
42	# Format: {"timestamp":"...","host_daemon_images":[...]} matching inspect's jq queries
43	CACHE_TS_BEFORE="$(date -u +%FT%TZ)"
44	docker images --no-trunc --format '{{json .}}' > cache_before_raw.txt
45	{
46	  printf '{"timestamp":"%s","host_daemon_images":[' "${CACHE_TS_BEFORE}"
47	  awk 'NR>1{printf ","}{printf "%s",$0}' cache_before_raw.txt
48	  printf ']}'
49	} > cache_before.json
50	rm -f cache_before_raw.txt
51	echo "cache_before.json written ($(wc -c < cache_before.json | tr -d ' ') bytes)"
52	
53	# Create docker-container driver for multi-platform builds (QEMU emulation)
54	docker buildx create --driver docker-container --name rb-builder --use
55	
56	# Build all platforms and push intermediate -multi tag
57	# --metadata-file captures BuildKit's resolved base image references, digests,
58	# and build parameters for base image provenance in inspect.
59	docker buildx build \
60	  --push \
61	  --platform="${_RBGY_PLATFORMS}" \
62	  --tag "${MULTI_URI}" \
63	  --metadata-file buildkit_metadata.json \
64	  --label "moniker=${_RBGY_MONIKER}" \
65	  --label "git.commit=${_RBGY_GIT_COMMIT}" \
66	  --label "git.branch=${_RBGY_GIT_BRANCH}" \
67	  ${BUILD_ARGS} \
68	  -f "${_RBGY_DOCKERFILE}" \
69	  .
70	
71	echo "Multi-platform push complete: ${MULTI_URI}"
72

1	#!/bin/bash
2	# RBGJBM Step 04: Per-platform pullback from intermediate -multi tag
3	# Builder: gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker
4	# Substitutions: _RBGY_MONIKER, _RBGY_PLATFORMS, _RBGY_PLATFORM_SUFFIXES,
5	#                _RBGY_GAR_LOCATION, _RBGY_GAR_PROJECT, _RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY,
6	#                _RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX, _RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE,
7	#                _RBGY_INSCRIBE_TIMESTAMP
8	#
9	# For each platform: docker pull --platform <plat> from the -multi tag,
10	# then docker tag to the per-platform hallmark tag and the inscribe-time
11	# alias tag (for CB images: field SLSA provenance generation).
12	
13	set -euo pipefail
14	
15	test -n "${_RBGY_MONIKER}"             || (echo "_RBGY_MONIKER missing"             >&2; exit 1)
16	test -n "${_RBGY_PLATFORMS}"           || (echo "_RBGY_PLATFORMS missing"           >&2; exit 1)
17	test -n "${_RBGY_PLATFORM_SUFFIXES}"   || (echo "_RBGY_PLATFORM_SUFFIXES missing"   >&2; exit 1)
18	test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION}"        || (echo "_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION missing"        >&2; exit 1)
19	test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT}"         || (echo "_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT missing"         >&2; exit 1)
20	test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY}"      || (echo "_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY missing"      >&2; exit 1)
21	test -n "${_RBGY_INSCRIBE_TIMESTAMP}"  || (echo "_RBGY_INSCRIBE_TIMESTAMP missing"  >&2; exit 1)
22	test -n "${_RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"    || (echo "_RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE missing"    >&2; exit 1)
23	
24	test -s .hallmark || (echo "hallmark not derived" >&2; exit 1)
25	HALLMARK="$(cat .hallmark)"
26	
27	IMAGE_BASE="${_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION}${_RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT}/${_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${_RBGY_MONIKER}"
28	MULTI_TAG="${_RBGY_INSCRIBE_TIMESTAMP}-multi"
29	
30	# Split platforms and suffixes into parallel arrays
31	# _RBGY_PLATFORMS is comma-separated: linux/amd64,linux/arm64,linux/arm/v7
32	# _RBGY_PLATFORM_SUFFIXES is comma-separated: -amd64,-arm64,-armv7
33	IFS=',' read -ra PLATFORMS <<< "${_RBGY_PLATFORMS}"
34	IFS=',' read -ra SUFFIXES <<< "${_RBGY_PLATFORM_SUFFIXES}"
35	
36	test "${#PLATFORMS[@]}" -eq "${#SUFFIXES[@]}" \
37	  || (echo "Platform/suffix count mismatch: ${#PLATFORMS[@]} vs ${#SUFFIXES[@]}" >&2; exit 1)
38	
39	echo "=== Per-platform pullback from ${IMAGE_BASE}:${MULTI_TAG} ==="
40	for IDX in "${!PLATFORMS[@]}"; do
41	  PLAT="${PLATFORMS[${IDX}]}"
42	  SUFFIX="${SUFFIXES[${IDX}]}"
43	  PER_PLAT_TAG="${HALLMARK}${_RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}${SUFFIX}"
44	  SLSA_ALIAS_TAG="${_RBGY_INSCRIBE_TIMESTAMP}${_RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}${SUFFIX}"
45	
46	  echo "--- Pulling ${PLAT} ---"
47	  docker pull --platform "${PLAT}" "${IMAGE_BASE}:${MULTI_TAG}"
48	  docker tag "${IMAGE_BASE}:${MULTI_TAG}" "${IMAGE_BASE}:${PER_PLAT_TAG}"
49	  echo "Tagged: ${IMAGE_BASE}:${PER_PLAT_TAG}"
50	
51	  # Alias tag for CB images: field — inscribe-time-predictable, triggers SLSA provenance
52	  docker tag "${IMAGE_BASE}:${MULTI_TAG}" "${IMAGE_BASE}:${SLSA_ALIAS_TAG}"
53	  echo "SLSA alias: ${IMAGE_BASE}:${SLSA_ALIAS_TAG}"
54	done
55	
56	echo "=== Pullback complete ==="
57

1	#!/bin/bash
2	# RBGJBM Step 05: Push each per-platform tag to registry
3	# Builder: gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker
4	# Substitutions: _RBGY_MONIKER, _RBGY_PLATFORM_SUFFIXES,
5	#                _RBGY_GAR_LOCATION, _RBGY_GAR_PROJECT, _RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY,
6	#                _RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX, _RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE
7	#
8	# Pre-pushes each per-platform tag so that imagetools create (step 06)
9	# can reference them as registry-resident images.
10	
11	set -euo pipefail
12	
13	test -n "${_RBGY_MONIKER}"             || (echo "_RBGY_MONIKER missing"             >&2; exit 1)
14	test -n "${_RBGY_PLATFORM_SUFFIXES}"   || (echo "_RBGY_PLATFORM_SUFFIXES missing"   >&2; exit 1)
15	test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION}"        || (echo "_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION missing"        >&2; exit 1)
16	test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT}"         || (echo "_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT missing"         >&2; exit 1)
17	test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY}"      || (echo "_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY missing"      >&2; exit 1)
18	test -n "${_RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"    || (echo "_RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE missing"    >&2; exit 1)
19	
20	test -s .hallmark || (echo "hallmark not derived" >&2; exit 1)
21	HALLMARK="$(cat .hallmark)"
22	
23	IMAGE_BASE="${_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION}${_RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT}/${_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${_RBGY_MONIKER}"
24	
25	IFS=',' read -ra SUFFIXES <<< "${_RBGY_PLATFORM_SUFFIXES}"
26	
27	echo "=== Pushing per-platform tags to registry ==="
28	for SUFFIX in "${SUFFIXES[@]}"; do
29	  PER_PLAT_TAG="${HALLMARK}${_RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}${SUFFIX}"
30	  echo "Pushing: ${IMAGE_BASE}:${PER_PLAT_TAG}"
31	  docker push "${IMAGE_BASE}:${PER_PLAT_TAG}"
32	done
33	# Capture Docker daemon state after pushes (forwarded to about via -diags)
34	# Format: {"timestamp":"...","host_daemon_images":[...]} matching inspect's jq queries
35	CACHE_TS_AFTER="$(date -u +%FT%TZ)"
36	docker images --no-trunc --format '{{json .}}' > cache_after_raw.txt
37	{
38	  printf '{"timestamp":"%s","host_daemon_images":[' "${CACHE_TS_AFTER}"
39	  awk 'NR>1{printf ","}{printf "%s",$0}' cache_after_raw.txt
40	  printf ']}'
41	} > cache_after.json
42	rm -f cache_after_raw.txt
43	echo "cache_after.json written ($(wc -c < cache_after.json | tr -d ' ') bytes)"
44	
45	echo "=== Push complete ==="
46

1	#!/bin/bash
2	# RBGJBM Step 06: Assemble consumer-facing multi-platform manifest list
3	# Builder: gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker
4	# Substitutions: _RBGY_MONIKER, _RBGY_PLATFORM_SUFFIXES,
5	#                _RBGY_GAR_LOCATION, _RBGY_GAR_PROJECT, _RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY,
6	#                _RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX, _RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE
7	#
8	# Uses docker buildx imagetools create to assemble per-platform tags
9	# (pushed in step 05) into a single consumer-facing manifest list tag.
10	# The consumer tag is platform-transparent: identical format to single-arch.
11	#
12	# This runs within the same Cloud Build — experiment 6 (build 6661d0cd)
13	# proved imagetools create works mid-build after docker push.
14	
15	set -euo pipefail
16	
17	test -n "${_RBGY_MONIKER}"             || (echo "_RBGY_MONIKER missing"             >&2; exit 1)
18	test -n "${_RBGY_PLATFORM_SUFFIXES}"   || (echo "_RBGY_PLATFORM_SUFFIXES missing"   >&2; exit 1)
19	test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION}"        || (echo "_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION missing"        >&2; exit 1)
20	test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT}"         || (echo "_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT missing"         >&2; exit 1)
21	test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY}"      || (echo "_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY missing"      >&2; exit 1)
22	test -n "${_RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"    || (echo "_RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE missing"    >&2; exit 1)
23	
24	test -s .hallmark || (echo "hallmark not derived" >&2; exit 1)
25	HALLMARK="$(cat .hallmark)"
26	
27	IMAGE_BASE="${_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION}${_RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT}/${_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${_RBGY_MONIKER}"
28	CONSUMER_TAG="${HALLMARK}${_RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
29	
30	IFS=',' read -ra SUFFIXES <<< "${_RBGY_PLATFORM_SUFFIXES}"
31	
32	# Build source image list for imagetools create
33	SOURCE_IMAGES=()
34	for SUFFIX in "${SUFFIXES[@]}"; do
35	  PER_PLAT_TAG="${HALLMARK}${_RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}${SUFFIX}"
36	  SOURCE_IMAGES+=("${IMAGE_BASE}:${PER_PLAT_TAG}")
37	done
38	
39	echo "=== Creating multi-platform manifest from per-platform images ==="
40	echo "Consumer tag: ${IMAGE_BASE}:${CONSUMER_TAG}"
41	echo "Sources: ${SOURCE_IMAGES[*]}"
42	
43	docker buildx imagetools create \
44	  -t "${IMAGE_BASE}:${CONSUMER_TAG}" \
45	  "${SOURCE_IMAGES[@]}"
46	
47	echo "=== Inspecting combined manifest ==="
48	docker buildx imagetools inspect "${IMAGE_BASE}:${CONSUMER_TAG}"
49

1	#!/bin/bash
2	# RBGJBM Step 07: Push diagnostic files as -diags registry artifact
3	# Builder: gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker
4	# Substitutions: _RBGY_DOCKERFILE, _RBGY_MONIKER,
5	#                _RBGY_GAR_LOCATION, _RBGY_GAR_PROJECT, _RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY,
6	#                _RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX, _RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_DIAGS
7	#
8	# Builds a FROM scratch container containing conjure build-time diagnostic files
9	# and pushes as hallmark-diags. The about pipeline (rbgja01) pulls this
10	# artifact and merges its contents into the -about container.
11	#
12	# Files included:
13	#   buildkit_metadata.json  - BuildKit resolved base images and build parameters (from step 03)
14	#   cache_before.json       - Docker daemon state before build (from step 03)
15	#   cache_after.json        - Docker daemon state after pushes (from step 05)
16	#   recipe.txt              - Dockerfile content (no size limit, unlike substitution variable)
17	#
18	# The -diags artifact persists in the registry as a durable record.
19	# Abjure cleans it up alongside -image, -about, and -vouch.
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	test -n "${_RBGY_MONIKER}"             || (echo "_RBGY_MONIKER missing"             >&2; exit 1)
24	test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION}"        || (echo "_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION missing"        >&2; exit 1)
25	test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT}"         || (echo "_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT missing"         >&2; exit 1)
26	test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY}"      || (echo "_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY missing"      >&2; exit 1)
27	test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"     || (echo "_RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX missing"     >&2; exit 1)
28	test -n "${_RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_DIAGS}"    || (echo "_RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_DIAGS missing"    >&2; exit 1)
29	test -n "${_RBGY_DOCKERFILE}"          || (echo "_RBGY_DOCKERFILE missing"          >&2; exit 1)
30	
31	test -s .hallmark || (echo "hallmark not derived" >&2; exit 1)
32	HALLMARK="$(cat .hallmark)"
33	
34	DIAGS_URI="${_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION}${_RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT}/${_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${_RBGY_MONIKER}:${HALLMARK}${_RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_DIAGS}"
35	
36	echo "=== Building -diags artifact ==="
37	
38	# Copy Dockerfile to recipe.txt (full content, no substitution variable size limit)
39	cp "${_RBGY_DOCKERFILE}" recipe.txt
40	echo "recipe.txt written ($(wc -c < recipe.txt | tr -d ' ') bytes)"
41	
42	# Generate Dockerfile for scratch container (include only files that exist)
43	{
44	  echo 'FROM scratch'
45	  test -f buildkit_metadata.json && echo 'COPY buildkit_metadata.json /buildkit_metadata.json'
46	  test -f cache_before.json      && echo 'COPY cache_before.json /cache_before.json'
47	  test -f cache_after.json       && echo 'COPY cache_after.json /cache_after.json'
48	  test -f recipe.txt             && echo 'COPY recipe.txt /recipe.txt'
49	} > Dockerfile.diags
50	
51	echo "--- Dockerfile.diags contents ---"
52	cat Dockerfile.diags
53	echo "--- end ---"
54	
55	docker build -t "${DIAGS_URI}" -f Dockerfile.diags .
56	docker push "${DIAGS_URI}"
57	
58	echo "Diags pushed: ${DIAGS_URI}"
59
